endpoints.name: Get a list of the available domains.
endpoints.description: Get a list of the available domains.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get information about a specific domain.
endpoints.description: Get information about a specific domain.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DOMAINID}} with a real domainid.

endpoints.name: Get your projects.
endpoints.description: Get your projects.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create a project.
endpoints.description: Create a project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get a specific project.
endpoints.description: Get a specific project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Delete a specific project.
endpoints.description: Delete a specific project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Update a specific project.
endpoints.description: Update a specific project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Add the provided images to the set of training images.
endpoints.description:
This API accepts body content as multipart/form-data and application/octet-stream. When using multipart
multiple image files can be sent at once, with a maximum of 64 files
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Delete images from the set of training images.
endpoints.description: Delete images from the set of training images.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Add the provided batch of images to the set of training images.
endpoints.description: This API accepts a batch of files, and optionally tags, to create images. There is a limit of 64 images and 20 tags.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Get images by id for a given project iteration.
endpoints.description:
This API will return a set of Images for the specified tags and optionally iteration. If no iteration is specified the
current workspace is used.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Add the specified predicted images to the set of training images.
endpoints.description: This API creates a batch of images from predicted images specified. There is a limit of 64 images and 20 tags.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Create a set of image regions.
endpoints.description:
This API accepts a batch of image regions, and optionally tags, to update existing images with region information.
There is a limit of 64 entries in the batch.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Delete a set of image regions.
endpoints.description: Delete a set of image regions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Get tagged images for a given project iteration.
endpoints.description:
This API supports batching and range selection. By default it will only return first 50 images matching images.
Use the {take} and {skip} parameters to control how many images to return in a given batch.
The filtering is on an and/or relationship. For example, if the provided tag ids are for the "Dog" and
"Cat" tags, then only images tagged with Dog and/or Cat will be returned
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Gets the number of images tagged with the provided {tagIds}.
endpoints.description:
The filtering is on an and/or relationship. For example, if the provided tag ids are for the "Dog" and
"Cat" tags, then only images tagged with Dog and/or Cat will be returned
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Associate a set of images with a set of tags.
endpoints.description: Associate a set of images with a set of tags.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Remove a set of tags from a set of images.
endpoints.description: Remove a set of tags from a set of images.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Get untagged images for a given project iteration.
endpoints.description:
This API supports batching and range selection. By default it will only return first 50 images matching images.
Use the {take} and {skip} parameters to control how many images to return in a given batch.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Gets the number of untagged images.
endpoints.description:
This API returns the images which have no tags for a given project and optionally an iteration. If no iteration is specified the
current workspace is used.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Add the provided images urls to the set of training images.
endpoints.description: This API accepts a batch of urls, and optionally tags, to create images. There is a limit of 64 images and 20 tags.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Get iterations for the project.
endpoints.description: Get iterations for the project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Get a specific iteration.
endpoints.description: Get a specific iteration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ITERATIONID}} with a real iterationid.

endpoints.name: Delete a specific iteration of a project.
endpoints.description: Delete a specific iteration of a project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ITERATIONID}} with a real iterationid.

endpoints.name: Update a specific iteration.
endpoints.description: Update a specific iteration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ITERATIONID}} with a real iterationid.

endpoints.name: Get the list of exports for a specific iteration.
endpoints.description: Get the list of exports for a specific iteration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ITERATIONID}} with a real iterationid.

endpoints.name: Export a trained iteration.
endpoints.description: Export a trained iteration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ITERATIONID}} with a real iterationid.

endpoints.name: Get detailed performance information about an iteration.
endpoints.description: Get detailed performance information about an iteration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ITERATIONID}} with a real iterationid.

endpoints.name: Get image with its prediction for a given project iteration.
endpoints.description:
This API supports batching and range selection. By default it will only return first 50 images matching images.
Use the {take} and {skip} parameters to control how many images to return in a given batch.
The filtering is on an and/or relationship. For example, if the provided tag ids are for the "Dog" and
"Cat" tags, then only images tagged with Dog and/or Cat will be returned
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ITERATIONID}} with a real iterationid.

endpoints.name:
Gets the number of images tagged with the provided {tagIds} that have prediction results from
training for the provided iteration {iterationId}.
endpoints.description:
The filtering is on an and/or relationship. For example, if the provided tag ids are for the "Dog" and
"Cat" tags, then only images tagged with Dog and/or Cat will be returned
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ITERATIONID}} with a real iterationid.

endpoints.name: Delete a set of predicted images and their associated prediction results.
endpoints.description: Delete a set of predicted images and their associated prediction results.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Get images that were sent to your prediction endpoint.
endpoints.description: Get images that were sent to your prediction endpoint.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Quick test an image.
endpoints.description: Quick test an image.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Quick test an image url.
endpoints.description: Quick test an image url.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Get the tags for a given project and iteration.
endpoints.description: Get the tags for a given project and iteration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Create a tag for the project.
endpoints.description: Create a tag for the project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.description: Get information about a specific tag.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{TAGID}} with a real tagid.

endpoints.name: Delete a tag from the project.
endpoints.description: Delete a tag from the project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{TAGID}} with a real tagid.

endpoints.name: Update a tag.
endpoints.description: Update a tag.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{TAGID}} with a real tagid.

endpoints.name: Queues project for training.
endpoints.description: Queues project for training.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: Get region proposals for an image. Returns empty array if no proposals are found.
endpoints.description: This API will get region proposals for an image along with confidences for the region. It returns an empty array if no proposals are found.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{IMAGEID}} with a real imageid.
